## Environment: (must)

The environment in which the bug was found (e.g., development, staging, production)

## Description: (must)

Briefly describe the issue

## Preconditions

Define state that must be true before reproducing the bug

## Steps to reproduce: (must)

[Step one]

[Step two]

[Step three]

## Reproducibility: (must)

Specify how often the bug occurs [Always / Sometimes / Rarely / Once]

## Expected result: (must)

Describe the correct/intended behavior

## Actual result: (must)

Describe what happens instead, incl. error messages if any
